name: Pork Chops with Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 rib or loin pork chops, 3/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt butter; stir in flour, salt, and pepper. Add chicken broth; cook and stir constantly until the mixture boils.
2. Cook for 1 minute, then remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a skillet, brown pork chops in oil. Season to taste with additional salt and pepper if desired.
4. In a greased baking dish (13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in.), layer potatoes and onion.
5. Pour the broth mixture over the potatoes and onion. Place pork chops on top.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. Uncover and bake an additional 30 minutes, or until potatoes are tender. If desired, sprinkle with paprika and parsley.
